curation_notes: Re-curated with updated guidelines. Patch commit is the merge of PR #6970 into main. Only one non-test source file changed (internal/db/repo_editor.go). The vulnerable function isRepositoryGitPath failed to check for paths containing '.git.' (with trailing dot), which Windows treats as equivalent to '.git'. This allowed attackers to bypass the upload restriction and place crafted git config files enabling SSH-based command execution. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern. Vulnerability class confirmed as command-injection per CWE-77/CWE-78 and advisory description.
